relations.evidence: The Production Analysis report provides statistics about products manufactured using Odoo's Manufacturing app.
To open the Production Analysis report, navigate to Manufacturing app --> Reporting --> Production Analysis.
...products manufactured using Odoo's Manufacturing app.

relations.evidence: Mike opens the Manufacturing app, and navigates to the Production Analysis page.
In the Search... bar, he enters the names of both products.
he opens the Search... bar drop-down menu, and clicks Product in the Group By section.
Below the Search... bar, Mike clicks on the Measures fa-caret-down drop-down menu.
and selects the Total Operation Cost/Unit option.
Finally, he selects the fa-bar-chart (bar chart) graph type.
the Production Analysis report shows a bar chart for the current year
In the Search... bar, he enters the names of both products.
he opens the Search... bar drop-down menu, and clicks Product in the Group By section.
and selects the Total Operation Cost/Unit option.
Finally, he selects the fa-bar-chart (bar chart) graph type.
The Production Analysis report can also be used to compare data
The Comparison feature is meant to be used with the fa-pie-chart (pie chart) graph type
The Comparison feature is meant to be used with the ... oi-view-pivot (pivot) view
He begins by selecting the fa-pie-chart (pie chart) graph type option at the top of the page
selects the Total Cost option from the Measures drop-down menu
This option displays the total amount spent producing each product
opens the Manufacturing app, and navigates to the Production Analysis page
in the Comparison section of the Search... bar
Search... bar drop-down menu, he leaves the 2024 filter enabled in the End Date section
leaves the 2024 filter enabled
enables the Q2 filter as well
selects the End Date: Previous Period option in the Comparison section
If End Date: Previous Year is selected instead
shop floor supervisor Adam opens the Manufacturing app
navigates to the Production Analysis page
selecting the fa-pie-chart (pie chart) graph type option
selects the Total Cost option
In the Search... bar drop-down menu
selects the End Date: Previous Period option in the Comparison section
